text: Assalam-u-Alaikum, I am Dr. Tayyab. I am doing the appendectomy with the help of Varis needle that is the Varis assisted two port appendectomy from last three months and Alhamdulillah up till now I have done almost twenty such procedures and with every procedure and the passage of time I am further refining this procedure.

Now I have invented this two millimeter knot pusher and with the help of this knot pusher I ligate the base of the appendix with the same thread loop that I passed through the various needles. Let me show you this two millimeter knot pusher and I also have refined my loop passer with the help of which I take the loop through the various needle and I will also show you that loop passer this is the modified version of my loop passer and it is made out of steel previously I was using the quilting needle but that had the problem of getting rust after staying in water but it is not the problem with this loop passer

The surgeon uses a two millimeter knot pusher, similar to the Windarker five mm knot pusher, featuring holes at the tip and side for accommodating thread. The knot pusher is introduced through the Varis needle, and an intra-abdominal instrument grasps the appendix, feeding it into the loop.

The surgeon addresses the meso-appendix, ensuring it is free from the base of the appendix. The same thread loop is then used to tie a knot at the base of the appendix. The varus needle is removed, and an extracorporeal knot is tied over both ends of the thread.

The surgeon uses a knot pusher to guide the thread into the abdominal cavity, ensuring it moves smoothly over the thread. The loop is then tightened around the base of the appendix using an instrument already positioned within the abdominal cavity.

and then remove the knot pusher so the additional benefit is you introduce the knot pusher through the same two millimeter hole through which the various needle was introduced and also it is time saving so what if you don't have time or don't know the channel how to get this knot pusher then there is another simple and easy way simply take the stylet of already present various needle and buy a zero point seven mm drill bit and get a hole at its tip with the help of a lathe man lathe man is kharadia in our market so this is all what we need to do

The surgeon feeds the end of the thread to the tip of the stylet, grabs it through the side hole, and pushes it through the two-millimeter incision into the abdominal cavity. The loop is then tightened over the base of the appendix.

I will upload a detailed separate video on different ways to perform the appendix me but here briefly I will tell you that how to cut the base and thread if you are using the ligature you can simply use it to cut the appendix and after that cut the thread with same ligature alternatively we can use the scissors to cut the appendix and after that the thread always cut the appendix first and then the thread later on so that you can get the support with the help of that thread this is another way to cut the thread pull it out and cut with the scissors extra corporally
